case_title: FIVE KEYS SCHOOLS AND PROGRAMS VS. CURTIS LATSON

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIVE KEYS SCHOOLS AND PROGRAMS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LATSON, CURTIS COMMERCIAL AND INDUSTRIAL APPLIANCE REPAIR $14,376.75 PRINCIPAL, $3,202.27 INTEREST, $690.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $18,269.02, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 75584012)
